# Keploy Blog — llms.txt
# https://keploy.io/blog

> Keploy is an open-source, eBPF-based API testing platform that converts real
> user traffic into reusable integration tests with auto-generated mocks and
> stubs — no code changes required.

## About This Site

The Keploy Blog publishes 500+ articles on software testing, API development,
and developer tooling. Content is authored by Keploy engineers, community
contributors, and guest writers.

- URL: https://keploy.io/blog
- Sitemap: https://keploy.io/blog/sitemap.xml
- CMS: Headless WordPress with WPGraphQL (content API at wp.keploy.io/graphql)
- Framework: Next.js (Pages Router) with server-side rendering and ISR

## Top Categories

- **Technology** — Deep dives on testing frameworks, CI/CD, language-specific
  guides, and developer tools.
- **Community** — Open-source updates, contributor spotlights, release notes,
  and event recaps.

## Popular Topics

- API testing and test automation
- Unit testing, integration testing, and end-to-end testing
- Test-driven development (TDD) and behavior-driven development (BDD)
- Mocking, stubbing, and service virtualization
- Code coverage analysis and best practices
- CI/CD pipeline optimization
- eBPF for network-level traffic capture
- Language guides: Go, Java, Python, Node.js, TypeScript, Rust
- Framework guides: Spring Boot, Django, Express, FastAPI, NestJS
- Tool comparisons: Jest vs Mocha, Cypress vs Playwright, Postman vs Keploy

## About Keploy

- Website: https://keploy.io
- GitHub: https://github.com/keploy/keploy (17,000+ stars)
- Docs: https://keploy.io/docs
- License: Apache 2.0

### Recognition

- API World 2023 — Best in API Infrastructure
- CNCF Landscape — listed under API Testing
- Google for Startups Accelerator alumnus

### Products

1. **Integration Testing (OSS)** — Record-replay engine using eBPF to capture
   API calls and generate test suites with deterministic replay.
2. **Test Agent** — AI-powered unit test generation from PR diffs.
3. **API Test Generation** — Generate tests from OpenAPI specs, Postman
   collections, or cURL commands.

## Author Pages

Author profiles are available at: https://keploy.io/blog/authors/{name}/

- Main site LLM context: https://keploy.io/llms-full.txt
- Documentation: https://keploy.io/docs
- Comparisons: https://keploy.io/compare
